sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.123456');
SELECT id, second(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = event_time + interval '1 minute' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, second(event_time) + 10 AS modified_seconds FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
